next_steps: Collect stool sample for Clostridium botulinum toxin and culture
Perform electromyography and nerve conduction studies with repetitive nerve stimulation
Contact the Infant Botulism Treatment and Prevention Program for emergency release of BabyBIG
Consult pediatric neurology and genetics for urgent genetic testing including SMN1
Continue supportive care including mechanical ventilation and nutritional support
Review history for exposure to honey or other environmental sources of botulinum spores
